overall.description: Static cinematic shot of the Hogwarts Great Hall from a Harry Potter game or film, showing students dining at long house tables under floating candle chandeliers. The gothic stone hall features high vaulted ceilings and warm candlelight illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with house dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint from the center aisle observing students dining in the great hall

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at the Gryffindor table eating and conversing
group of students dining together at the left house table

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended by magic forming a chandelier canopy overhead
red and gold banner with lion crest hanging on the nearest center table
long wooden banquet tables lined with students and food platters
tall gothic arched windows with stone tracery along the left wall
high vaulted stone ceiling with ribbed arches disappearing into darkness

segments.scene_description: A static view of the Hogwarts Great Hall during dinner time, with the camera positioned in the center aisle looking toward the head table. Floating candles illuminate the gothic stone hall from above, while students in robes dine at long wooden tables. The Gryffindor banner hangs prominently on the nearest table, and the high vaulted ceiling stretches into the shadows above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of the Hogwarts Great Hall, capturing the atmospheric grandeur of a student dinner. It begins centered in the main aisle, looking toward the head table beneath a high vaulted ceiling that stretches into deep shadows. Floating candles cast a warm, flickering glow over the gothic stone architecture and the students in robes dining at long wooden tables. The scene remains focused on this immersive tableau, with the Gryffindor banner hanging prominently in the foreground to anchor the composition.
